pr_title: Cache discount calculations per customer segment
pr_description: Adds get_discounted_price() to avoid recomputing the discount function for repeat lookups in the same customer segment.
injected_issue: The cache is keyed only on segment and ignores base_price, so the second call for a segment with a different base_price incorrectly returns the first cached price instead of recomputing -- a correctness regression, not just a cache-hit-rate issue.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: The only test that exercises the cache reuse path calls get_discounted_price() twice with the exact same base_price (50.0) for the same segment, so the wrong cache key never produces a visibly wrong price.
